title: ornithogalum fistulosum
intro: Ornithogalum fistulosum, also known as the hollow-flowered star of Bethlehem, is a perennial plant that belongs to the lily family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum fistulosum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and improving breathing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
